content:
# Recommendations ‚Äî next plan iter (iter-018)

## Closest-to-completion / prioritize
1. **FBC algebraic leg `chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc_extendScalarsComp` (PARTIAL).** The `natTrans_ext_of_unit` reduction already discharges the conjugate side; only the 3-factor composite-unit residual remains, blocked solely by `Eq.mpr`/`id` casts. Two concrete fixes (NOT a warm-retry):
   - (a) **refactor** the two `‚Ä¶ReassocNat` defs (`chartBaseChangeModuleReassocNat`, `chartBaseChangeRestrictReassocNat`) to remove the `letI : Algebra ‚Ä¶` casts so `.hom` is a clean `‚â´` composite, then the per-factor `homEquiv_extendScalarsComp` coherence fires; OR
   - (b) prover: prove the leg via two `conjugateEquiv_comp` splits, each factor closed by the now-proven `conjugateEquiv_extendScalarsComp`.
   Route (b) is a single prover lane (no refactor) ‚Äî recommend it first.

## Blocked ‚Äî do NOT re-assign the same approach
2. **FBC geometric leg `chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison_mate` (BLOCKED 1 iter).** The `natTrans_ext_of_unit` scaffold whnf-bombs (200k hb) over `(Spec _).Modules`; Mathlib has NO `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv`. Do NOT re-send the scaffold. Structural prerequisite: make `conjugateEquiv`-over-`(Spec _).Modules` elaboration cheap ‚Äî opaque-`def` the binary-composite adjunction, OR build a bespoke morphism-level `homEquiv_pullbackComp`. This is a **mathlib-analogist (api-alignment)** or **refactor** item, not a prover retry. `maxHeartbeats` is banned.
3. **SNAP `hK_lhs` reassoc wall `(W‚â´T)‚â´Œ± ‚Üí W‚â´(T‚â´Œ±)` (BLOCKED; 6th iter `hK_lhs` is the live blocker ‚Äî STUCK).** Step (a) is committed; step (b) is verified bomb-free once right-associated; the gap is the reassoc, which bombs on EVERY tactic. pc017 pre-committed the iter-018 reversal: **2nd analogist on the reassoc sub-step** (target: a project-local statement-OBJECT-pinned localized reassoc/associator lemma, `(C := MonoidalPresheaf X)` on every inner tensor ‚Äî analogue of the iter-016 head statement-pin), OR escalate to the **queued durable dual-instance refactor** (delete `pshModMonoidal`, the root cause). Do NOT send a prover warm-retry of the bombing tactics. Given this is now the 6th churning iter on `hK_lhs`, strongly favor the durable refactor over yet another tactic patch.

## Reusable patterns discovered (now in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base)
- **`natTrans_ext_of_unit`** mate-uniqueness engine (unit-transpose route; element-wise + counit-side are DEAD/CIRCULAR) + the abstract-category idiom (`have e1 := by simp; rw [e1, Category.assoc]; simp [reassoc_of% ‚Ä¶]` ‚Äî `rw`/`simp only` won't match `.app`/`.map`-headed `‚â´`-subterms).
- **Bomb-free transformer principle** for localized-tensor-Œº goals: only an equation whose two sides are EXACT goal subterms transforms bomb-free, applied via `congrArg`-peel with holes; `rw [hsplit]`/`conv => rw` motive-bomb.

## Coverage debt (blueprint these ‚Äî planner authors prose, do NOT let review author it)
New unmatched `lean_aux` decls in `FlatBaseChange.lean` (both sorry-free, closed this iter):
- `AlgebraicGeometry.natTrans_ext_of_unit` ‚Äî general mate-uniqueness helper; deps `Adjunction.right_triangle_components`, `NatTrans.naturality`. Reusable for both b2 legs.
- `AlgebraicGeometry.conjugateEquiv_extendScalarsComp` ‚Äî algebraic per-piece mate fact; deps `natTrans_ext_of_unit`, `unit_conjugateEquiv`, `ModuleCat.homEquiv_extendScalarsComp`, `Adjunction.comp_unit_app`.
Pre-existing unmatched `‚Ä¶Nat` def helpers (blueprint when convenient): `chartBaseChangeGeometricComparisonNat`, `chartBaseChangeModuleReassocNat`, `chartBaseChangePushforwardNat`, `chartBaseChangeRestrictReassocNat`. (~70 `RelativeTensorCoequalizer.*`/`W_*` SNAP helpers stay DEFERRED to the SNAP file-split refactor, as documented since iter-008.)

## Hygiene (MEDIUM ‚Äî bundle into the mate-excision/cleanup lane; lean-auditor iter017)
- `FlatBaseChange.lean:184-247` ‚Äî stale ~60-line STATUS narrative in `pushforward_spec_tilde_iso` docstring (refs prover-internal "iter-234/236/241"); proof is fully complete. Prune.
- `FlatBaseChange.lean:1856-1858` ‚Äî 3 dead stacked `set_option maxHeartbeats 4000000 in` (only innermost 1.6M applies) before `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose`. Prune.
- `FlatBaseChange.lean:1821` ‚Äî `maxHeartbeats 4000000 in` before a section comment, not a decl; flows to `base_change_mate_domain_read_legs_param` invisibly. Re-scope.
- 9 minors = accumulated dead scaffolding in the compile-dead mate region (full list in `logs/iter-017/lean-auditor-iter017-report.md`).
- The whole compile-dead `base_change_mate_*` region (off-path dead riders, sorry bodies) is scheduled for a dedicated mate-excision refactor iter (TO_USER decision); these hygiene items resolve there.
